name: unifeather
description: Lightweight, privacy-friendly, tree-shakeable website analytics — tracker, endpoint and dashboard.

scripts.build: bun run --filter '@unifeather/core' build && bun run --filter '@unifeather/tracker' build && bun run --filter '@unifeather/server' build && bun run --filter '@unifeather/dashboard' build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter '@unifeather/core' build && bun run --filter '*' typecheck
scripts.publish: bun publish --cwd packages/core && bun publish --cwd packages/tracker && bun publish --cwd packages/server && bun publish --cwd packages/dashboard
